concerns.text: T030 implements 'synthetic data generation' to verify GPR recovery, but SC-004 explicitly requires measuring the correlation between permutation importance rankings and a 'user-provided JSON ranking or literature baseline'. T030 substitutes a synthetic proxy for the required external validation, weakening the success criterion.

Constitution Principle VII (Physical Measurement Independence) and Plan Task 0.2 mandate a 'Source Independence & Tautology Check' to verify predictors and targets originate from distinct data streams. T013 only checks file existence and T014 validates schema; no task exists to perform the required tautology/tautological correlation check.

SC-002 requires RMSE to be reported 'as a percentage of the observed range of the target property'. T027 only specifies saving standard R², RMSE, and MAE to JSON, omitting the specific percentage-of-range calculation logic mandated by the success criterion.

FR-001 mandates the system 'MUST download and parse public AM alloy datasets'. T013 explicitly implements 'no automated download' and only checks for file existence. This is a semantic weakening of the functional requirement, contradicting the spec's download mandate.
